bio.es: Co-creador de Go, UTF-8 y Plan 9 en Bell Labs. Trabajó junto a Ken Thompson y Dennis Ritchie en los laboratorios donde nació Unix. Su filosofía de diseño enfatiza la simplicidad, la concurrencia y las interfaces claras. Co-autor de 'The Practice of Programming' y 'The Unix Programming Environment'.
bio.en: Co-creator of Go, UTF-8 and Plan 9 at Bell Labs. Worked alongside Ken Thompson and Dennis Ritchie at the labs where Unix was born. His design philosophy emphasizes simplicity, concurrency and clear interfaces. Co-author of 'The Practice of Programming' and 'The Unix Programming Environment'.
